settings.headline: Discover the World with Skystar Tour & Travels
settings.subheadline: Handcrafted tour packages for every dream destination. Domestic, international & honeymoon specials.
settings.whatsapp_message: Hi Skystar Tour and Travels! I'd like to explore your tour packages. Please help me plan my dream trip! 🌍

settings.title: Where Would You Like to Go?
settings.subtitle: Choose from our handpicked destination categories and start planning your dream trip.

settings.title: 24/7 Customer Support
settings.description: Our travel experts are always available to assist you before, during, and after your trip.

settings.title: Best Price Guarantee
settings.description: We match the best prices in the market. If you find it cheaper, we'll beat it.

settings.title: Verified Hotels & Resorts
settings.description: Every hotel in our packages is personally inspected and guest-reviewed.

settings.title: Easy WhatsApp Booking
settings.description: No complicated forms. Just message us on WhatsApp and we'll handle everything.

settings.title: Your Trusted Travel Partner
settings.subtitle: We make every journey seamless, memorable, and worry-free.

settings.text: Absolutely amazing experience! The team at Skystar planned every detail perfectly. The hotels were wonderful and the local experiences were unforgettable!
settings.name: Priya Sharma

settings.text: Our honeymoon in Bali was everything we dreamed of. Skystar took care of all the arrangements and made it so stress-free. Will book again!
settings.name: Rahul & Anjali Verma

settings.text: Best price guarantee is real! I compared many agencies and Skystar gave the best deal for our Manali trip. The WhatsApp support was super convenient.
settings.name: Arjun Kapoor

settings.title: Real Stories from Happy Travellers
settings.subtitle: Over 5,000 satisfied travellers have trusted Skystar for their dream holidays.
